name: The Butcher's Son
evidence: Official site thebutchersveganson.com: 100% plant-based Vegan Deli & Bakery; listed on HappyCow; PETA vegan steak award.

name: Mission Burger Co.
evidence: Atlanta Magazine 'vegan eatery Mission Burger Co.'; HappyCow-listed plant-based burger restaurant using Impossible/Gardein/seitan.

name: Kebab Kitchen
evidence: Official site kebab-kitchen-essen.de markets meat döner ('perfectly seasoned meat in flatbread'); falafel/veggie are side options only.

name: Next Level Burger
evidence: America's first 100% plant-based burger chain (nextlevelvg.com); Seattle locations Yelp-categorized Vegan (rebranding to Next Level Veggie Grill; Roosevelt spot shown closed on Yelp).

name: Meisterbäckerei Schneckenburger
evidence: Conventional artisan bakery chain; own site meisterbaeckerei.de flags only select breads/rolls as vegan, i.e. the rest of the catalog is not.

name: Nice Burger
evidence: Trades as 'Nice Burger 100% Vegan' (niceguysvegan.com); HappyCow-listed; OC's first 100% vegan charbroiled burger drive-thru.

name: Rolle Kebap
evidence: Menu of 110 dishes includes classic meat döner ('meat is crispy and fresh'); vegan seitan döner is only an option (so-lebt-dresden.de).

name: Kebap Delüüxe
evidence: Own site kebap-deluuxe.de: traditional döner with beef and chicken, 100% halal; vegan seitan döner is a separate menu line.

name: Mauer Food Kebab
evidence: Restaurant Guru: offers both meat and vegan options; reviews praise the (meat) döner; vegan seitan döner is one menu option.

name: Nice Burger
evidence: Same 100% vegan chain; Irvine location listed as 'NICE BURGER 100% VEGAN - IRVINE' on ordering platforms and HappyCow.

name: PLNT Burger
evidence: plntburger.com: menu is entirely vegan/plant-based; DC locations Yelp-categorized Vegan.

name: Next Level Burger
evidence: Denver location now Next Level Veggie Grill, 100% plant-based menu (nextlevelvg.com, Yelp Vegan category).

name: Shawarma Al Shami
evidence: Facebook page categorized 'Vegetarian/Vegan Restaurant' but place serves shawarma (typically meat); menu not verifiable in two searches — inconclusive.

name: Schloss Döner
evidence: Schloss Döner und Pizza Haus menu includes steaks, meat dishes, rotisserie and classic döner; vegan dishes are just a category.

name: Kebab & Pizza Haus
evidence: No exact match found in two searches; generic name matches several Karlsruhe döner shops — cannot identify the specific place.

name: Flower Burger Pescara
evidence: Flower Burger is a 100% vegan Italian chain; Pescara location opened 2024, described as first fully vegan fast food in Abruzzo (flowerburger.it, HappyCow, Food News Italia).

name: Rise Above Pizza & Wings
evidence: Hamilton's first and only 100% vegan pizzeria per its own site, HappyCow, and vKind.

name: Karma Kebab
evidence: 100% vegan kebab brand (celeriac/seitan kebab), confirmed by karmakebab.nl and Dutch vegetarian society; note HappyCow flags the Amsterdam location as CLOSED.

name: Memo Kebab
evidence: Ordinary halal Turkish doner shop in Esslingen; menu centers on meat doner, pide, lahmacun (memo-kebab.menufyy.com).

name: King Döner
evidence: Regular doner kebab restaurant in Dresden serving meat doner as the core menu; vegan seitan/falafel items are options only (king-doner-dresden.de, Wolt).

name: LuvBurger
evidence: Self-described vegan plant-based burger joint with entirely vegan menu (luvburger.com, HappyCow, Tripadvisor reviews).

name: Odd Burger
evidence: Odd Burger is Canada's well-known all-vegan fast food chain (oddburger.com, vegconomist, VegNews).

name: Odd Burger
evidence: Odd Burger is an all-vegan chain; Whitby is one of its Ontario locations (country appears mislabeled as US — it is Whitby, Ontario, Canada).

name: Burger Fiancé
evidence: 100% plant-based burger restaurant in Old Montreal per HappyCow, Yelp, and The Main.

name: BurgerPatch
evidence: Burger Patch is Sacramento's 100% vegan fast food brand since 2017 (burgerpatch.com); note Yelp marks the Midtown and East Sac locations as CLOSED though the official site remains active.

name: UNiQ Burger
evidence: Self-described 100% plant-based restaurant in Scottsdale, Yelp category Vegan, voted best vegan restaurant 2023-2025 (uniqburger.com).

name: Odd Burger
evidence: Odd Burger is an all-vegan chain headquartered in London, Ontario (country appears mislabeled as US — it is London, Ontario, Canada).

name: Mission Burger Co.
evidence: All-vegan burger joint on South Lamar in Austin per its own site, The Infatuation, and abillion.

name: Jimmy's Burger
evidence: Ordinary fast-food burger/delivery shop in Leonberg; no menu details found and no source describes it as vegan — almost certainly not vegan but no direct menu evidence located.

name: Thüringer Rostbratwurst
evidence: An 'Original Thüringer Rostbratwurst' imbiss sells the traditional PGI pork sausage by definition; Facebook page 'Imbiss Original Thüringer Rostbratwurst aus JENA' confirms a standard bratwurst stand, no vegan evidence.

name: Zero Kebab
evidence: Zerö Kebab is a 100% plant-based döner shop (HappyCow 'Fully Vegan', official Instagram 'Plant-Based Döner', Wolt listing).

name: NoButcher
evidence: Genuine vegan deli/butcher brand, but permanently CLOSED both Las Vegas locations (July 2025 per Review-Journal, Yelp marked CLOSED).

name: Sin Carne Cantina
evidence: Fully vegan Latin American cafe, but located in Matlock Bath (Derbyshire), not Bath, and HappyCow marks it CLOSED.

name: Next Level Burger
evidence: 100% plant-based chain; Beaverton location now operates as 'Veggie Grill by Next Level' with an all-vegan menu (Yelp category Vegan, official site).

name: Sun Day Burgers - Mauer Park
evidence: Vegan burger stall at Mauerpark flea market (grilled tofu burgers, raw vegan desserts; HappyCow and vegan Berlin guides list it as vegan).

name: Fishoria
evidence: Regular fish & chips restaurant serving real fish, seafood baskets and prawns; has a vegan section (banana blossom fish) but is not a vegan place.

name: Monty's Good Burger
evidence: Well-known 100% plant-based burger chain in LA (official site, Yelp, The Infatuation all describe it as fully vegan).

name: Next Level Burger
evidence: Part of America's first 100% plant-based burger chain; SF Potrero Hill location listed on HappyCow as vegan.

name: König Kebap
evidence: Ordinary Turkish döner/kebab shop in Freiburg serving meat döner and pizza; falafel is the only notable veg option, no evidence of being vegan.

name: The Fisherman
evidence: The Fisherman Vegan Restaurant is a 100% vegan former-seafood restaurant at An Bang Beach (Hoi An, Da Nang region); no meat restaurant of this name found in Da Nang.

name: BETR BURGERS
evidence: Fully vegan American-style burger shop in St. Pauli, Hamburg (pea-protein patties, oat milkshakes; Yelp category Vegan, HappyCow listed).

name: Gözleme Kebab Turkish Street food
evidence: Regular Turkish gozleme/kebab vendor (Docklands) serving lamb, feta and meat kebabs; vegan gozleme is only an option.

name: Klaus Kebab
evidence: Döner shop that serves meat döner alongside seitan/falafel vegan options ('serves meat with vegan options' per listings; Wolt menu has crunchy chicken etc.).

name: Ahimsa Burgers
evidence: Fully vegan burger restaurant in Lagoa da Conceição, Florianópolis ('Ahimsa Vegan Burgers' on Tripadvisor; Spinach/HappyCow list as fully vegan).

name: Odd Burger
evidence: Odd Burger is a 100% vegan fast-food chain (Canada — this is Hamilton, Ontario, not US), but HappyCow reports this location permanently closed.

name: The Happy Fish
evidence: Scotland's first 100% vegan chippy (HappyCow, Yelp, myveggietravels); serves fake fish/tofish only

name: Kalinski Wurstwagen
evidence: Currywurst stand with real sausages from regional butchers; vegan currywurst is only one menu option

name: Hiro Burger
evidence: Regular American-style smashburger joint (hiroburger.de); meat burgers standard, only one Beyond patty option

name: Flower Burger Milano Vittorio Veneto
evidence: Flower Burger is Italy's first 100% vegan burger chain (flowerburger.it, HappyCow, Yelp 'Vegan' category)

name: Flower Burger Bari
evidence: Same 100% vegan Flower Burger chain; Bari branch listed on HappyCow and esserevegan.it

name: Odd Burger
evidence: Canada's first vegan fast-food chain; Oakville branch fully vegan (HappyCow, Oakville News) — note: located in Ontario, Canada, not US

name: Neat Burger Milano
evidence: Neat Burger is a 100% plant-based chain (Hamilton/DiCaprio); note HappyCow reports Porta Venezia branch closed March 2026, Merlata Bloom branch open

name: Jim's Burger
evidence: Ordinary German burger restaurant; sources indicate meat burgers standard and no fully-vegan dishes

name: Hungry Jack's Burgers Mornington
evidence: Hungry Jack's is Burger King's Australian franchise — meat fast food with a few plant-based options

name: Next Level Burger
evidence: America's first 100% plant-based burger chain; Concord branch all-vegan (HappyCow, Visit Concord)

name: MOS Burger
evidence: Japanese fast-food chain serving beef/chicken/pork/seafood burgers as core menu; only isolated plant-based items

name: Ribs

name: Monty's Good Burger
evidence: 100% plant-based burger and shake spot (montysgoodburger.com, Impossible patties, vegan cheese) with multiple LA locations

name: Mexiterranean Grill
evidence: Mexican/Mediterranean grill; regular menu includes animal products (e.g. goat cheese sandwiches), standard taco/burrito grill, not a vegan restaurant

name: Nice Burger
evidence: Branded 'Nice Burger 100% Vegan' on Grubhub/UberEats/DoorDash; HappyCow-listed all-vegan menu

name: Restaurant Sushi Bar KOI
evidence: General Asian fusion/sushi restaurant in Bamberg serving fish sushi; only a few vegan items (e.g. tofu poke bowl) per koibamberg.de menu and Yelp/Tripadvisor.

name: Oyster Oyster
evidence: Michelin-starred plant-focused DC restaurant, but official site describes a vegetarian tasting menu that 'can be made vegan or oystertarian' — oysters (animal) are a regular menu option, so not 100% vegan.

name: Garden Grill
evidence: All-vegan brick-and-mortar in Summerlin, Las Vegas ('GARDEN GRILL Vegan Kitchen'); Yelp category Vegan, covered by vegansbaby.com as fully vegan.

name: York grill

name: LoveBurger
evidence: Branded 'LoveBurger 100% Vegan' in Neukölln, Berlin; listed on HappyCow and Tripadvisor as fully vegan burger restaurant.

name: Happy Kebab

name: Neat Burger
evidence: Neat Burger is the 100% vegan plant-based burger chain backed by Lewis Hamilton (neat-food.com, HappyCow, Camden Market listing).

name: Next Level Burger
evidence: America's first 100% plant-based burger chain; Austin location inside Whole Foods flagship confirmed on nextlevelvg.com and HappyCow.

evidence: All-vegan restaurant in Las Vegas (Yelp category 'Vegan', HappyCow, Instagram 'GARDEN GRILL Vegan Kitchen').

name: Garden Grill
evidence: Duplicate of same Las Vegas place: all-vegan restaurant per Yelp 'Vegan' category, HappyCow and its own branding 'Vegan Kitchen'.

evidence: Regular doner kebab shop in Jena (restaurantguru/speisekarte.menu show meat kebab menu); offers falafel as vegan option but meat is the core menu

evidence: Australia's first entirely plant-based burger chain (soulburger.com.au, Broadsheet, PETA); 100% vegan menu

name: Glasgow Burgers

name: Nonno's Butcher
evidence: Nonno's Plant-Based Butcher at Hamilton Farmers' Market; 100% meat- and dairy-free vegan deli (HappyCow, hamiltonfarmersmarket.ca)

name: Monty's Good Burger
evidence: Well-known 100% plant-based burger chain in LA (montysgoodburger.com, Yelp 'Vegan' category, LiveKindly)

name: Goginara Korean charcoal BBQ
evidence: Name means 'Meat Land'; Korean charcoal BBQ with premium beef/pork cuts, minimum two beef/pork items required to use the grill (gogi-nara.nl, Tripadvisor)

name: Hot Doggie
evidence: Was a 100% vegan hot dog/burger bar (pea/wheat-protein sausages) but HappyCow lists it as CLOSED

name: Odd Burger
evidence: Canadian vegan fast-food chain (oddburger.com, HappyCow, Daily Hive); Edmonton locations are fully plant-based

name: Garden Grill
evidence: All-vegan restaurant in Summerlin, Las Vegas (Yelp 'Vegan', HappyCow, gardengrilllv 'GARDEN GRILL Vegan Kitchen')

name: Burger Patch
evidence: Was Sacramento's 100% vegan burger spot, but last location permanently closed Sep 2025 (vegconomist, Yelp marked CLOSED)

name: Nice Burger
evidence: Operates as 'Nice Burger 100% Vegan' — OC's first 100% vegan charbroiled burger place (niceburgervegan.com, HappyCow, Yelp 'Vegan')

name: Wings of Heart Sanctuary
evidence: Vegan farmed-animal sanctuary in Spain (wingsofheart.org); explicitly vegan ethos, volunteers' food/clothing must be vegan

name: Happy Hen Chicken Rescue
evidence: Happy Hen Animal Sanctuary, 40-acre farmed-animal rescue in San Luis Obispo founded by animal-rights activist Zoe Rosenberg (happyhen.org); genuine sanctuary, not a food business

name: Redwings Horse Sanctuary
evidence: GFAS-accredited equine rescue sanctuary in Paso Robles (redwingshorsesanctuary.org); genuine animal sanctuary, no animal products sold

name: Sanctuario Wings of Heart
evidence: Well-known vegan farm animal sanctuary in Spain (wingsofheart.org, now 'Santuario Vegan'); ~300 rescued farm animals, strict vegan policy for volunteers.

name: Hooves & Wings Rescue
evidence: Two searches found no organization by this name in any Bedford (US); only similarly-named orgs elsewhere (Hooves & Paws, A Home for Hooves).

name: Santuario Wings of Heart
evidence: Same known vegan farm animal sanctuary (Wings of Heart / Santuario Vegan); note sources place it near Madrid, not Velez-Malaga — location may need review.

name: Chicken Run Rescue
evidence: Genuine hen rescue sanctuary (chickenrunrescue.org, founded 2001, oldest US urban chicken rescue); listed as 'Vegan Hen Sanctuary' on veganparadise.org.

name: Happy Hen Chicken Rescue (Chickens)
evidence: Happy Hen Animal Sanctuary (happyhen.org), 40-acre farmed animal sanctuary in San Luis Obispo founded by animal-rights activist Zoe Rosenberg.

name: Chocowinity Chicken Sanctuary
evidence: Genuine 501(c)(3) chicken sanctuary in Chocowinity NC (chocochickensanctuary.org); rescues chickens and educates against factory farming.

name: Redwings Horse Sanctuary
evidence: Genuine horse rescue sanctuary — UK's largest horse welfare charity (redwings.org.uk), HQ Norfolk; an animal sanctuary, not a food business (not vegan-branded).

name: Eagle Wings Sanctuary
evidence: No animal sanctuary by this name found in any Manchester; closest matches are a domestic-violence nonprofit (eagleswingssanctuary.org) and Eaglewing Sanctuary in Yoder, CO.

name: Chickenlandia
evidence: 'Welcome to Chickenlandia' is a backyard chicken-keeping (egg/husbandry) education brand and YouTube channel at a private Bellingham residence — not an animal sanctuary or vegan business.

name: Chicken Run Rescue
evidence: Same genuine vegan hen sanctuary as the Minnesota entry (chickenrunrescue.org); likely duplicate record.

name: The Herbivorous Butcher
evidence: The nation's first all-vegan butcher shop (theherbivorousbutcher.com), 507 1st Ave NE Minneapolis; makes only vegan meats and cheeses.

name: Wilmersburger Käseersatz HQ
evidence: Wilmersburger is a 100% vegan cheese-alternative producer (wilmersburger.de); note official imprint puts HQ in Langenfeld, not Hamburg — location may need review.
